problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: The key to Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? is Reservoir computing with physical substrate — specifically Reservoir computing with — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.
